credential.local_dev_fallback: isolated dev credential; never shared production credentials

lifecycle.provisioning: Provisioned as an Entra Agent ID via workload identity federation on agent approval by the platform admin; no standing secret issued. [VERIFY: Entra Agent ID GA federation mapping per PRD section 6]
lifecycle.retirement: Disabled by the platform admin when the manifest status moves to deprecated or blocked (kill-switch path); the technical owner confirms decommission and revokes federation trust.
lifecycle.rotation: No long-lived secret to rotate; federated credentials are short-lived (<= 24h per credential.max_lifetime_hours). Federation trust and scopes reviewed quarterly.

scopes.justification: Read provided T-SQL schema DDL, migration scripts, and table/column/index definitions supplied for the engagement. Reads files only — never a live database.
Search an approved T-SQL / SQL Server knowledge base (Microsoft Learn docs, patterns, internal standards) for relevant guidance.
Produce a reviewed T-SQL draft (stored procedure, function, migration, or query) with cited rationale, for human review. Never executes SQL.
